summary: Pre-deployment audit (Iteration 8) for Simplifii-β EdTech app completed successfully. All 32 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages and features verified working. Landing page unified with login/signup form, /login redirects to /, all 8 tools accessible, Study Buddy AI chat functional, tickets terminology used throughout, Google Analytics placeholder confirmed.

issues: Minor React warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' in BrowserRouter/Landing - does not affect functionality

LANDING PAGE: AI disclaimer in footer

SIGNUP: New user gets 1 free ticket

BRIEF SIMPLIFIER: V2 Deep Dive selected by default
RUBRIC SIMPLIFIER: PDF upload zone visible
RUBRIC SIMPLIFIER: Text input area present

critical_code_review_comments: All 8 tools properly implemented with upload zones, form fields, and ticket costs
Landing page correctly unified with login/signup form embedded
/login route correctly redirects to / (no separate login page)
Study Buddy AI chat renders globally when authenticated
Depth selector on Brief Simplifier has 3 levels with correct ticket costs
Google Analytics placeholder properly configured in index.html
All prices in AUD as required
Australian English used throughout (organisation, analyse, colour)
seed_data_creation: Created new test user audit4084@test.com during signup flow test

mocked_apis.Stripe: Credit check BYPASSED for owner testing - payments still create real Stripe checkout sessions
mocked_apis.Study Buddy: Uses real Emergent LLM Key (Claude Sonnet 4.5) - returns actual AI responses

context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-deployment audit complete. All features verified working. Landing page has unified login/signup form on right side. /login redirects to /. Brief Simplifier has 3 depth levels (V1 Quick Scan, V2 Deep Dive default, V3 Expert 2 tickets). Study Buddy is a persistent purple chat bubble that appears on all authenticated pages. Tickets page shows 3 tiers: Starter Pack 5/$7.50, Semester Saver 15/$15 BEST VALUE, All-Access Pass 30/$25. Google Analytics uses placeholder GA_MEASUREMENT_ID. All tools show '1 ticket' cost except V3 Expert which shows '2 tickets'. Cookie-based auth with session_token cookie.
